-- Auto-converted from GraalScript joinResource("sign") -- [CLIENT-SIDE — server no-op] -- if (created) setstring this.text,#s(vince_diesel)Welcome to Burger Refuge -- #b -- What would you like to buy?#b -- You can choose from are Menu.#b -- To buy say Buy and the item name#b -- like "Buy Hamburger" for example.#b -- -Menu-#b -- Hamburger - 5g#b -- Cheeseburger - 10g#b -- Popcorn - 15g#b -- Soft Drink - 20g#b -- Sub - 40g#b -- I hope you will like the movie and i#b -- hope ill see you here agen.#b;
